sql_array: CREATE TABLE sequences (id INT PRIMARY KEY, seq_val INT);
INSERT INTO sequences (id, seq_val) VALUES (1, 2), (2, 3), (3, NULL);
SELECT sequence_set('sample', (SELECT MAX(seq_val) FROM sequences WHERE seq_val IS NOT NULL), 1) AS new_state;
INSERT INTO sequences (id, seq_val) VALUES (4, (SELECT sequence_next('sample')));
SELECT seq_val FROM sequences WHERE seq_val > (SELECT sequence_set('sample', 5, 0));
SELECT seq_val, (SELECT sequence_next('sample')) AS next_seq FROM sequences GROUP BY seq_val HAVING seq_val IS NOT NULL;
SELECT sequence_set('sample', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sequences WHERE seq_val IS NOT NULL), 1) + (SELECT MAX(seq_val) FROM sequences) AS updated_value;
SELECT * FROM sequences WHERE seq_val = (SELECT COALESCE(sequence_next('sample'), 0));
SELECT sequence_set('sample', 10, 1) AS updated_seq, xpath_string('/root/child', '<root><child>10</child></root>') AS updated_node;
SELECT seq_val, xpath_string('/root/child', '<root><child>' || seq_val || '</child></root>') FROM sequences WHERE seq_val IS NOT NULL;
